chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1395 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 6699/2025 (urgency) 29.09.2025 Syed Jan Muhammad Bukhari, Advocate for Petitioner Barrister Unaib Kamal, Advocate for Respondents-University Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh ----- Urgency granted. the Petition is taken up for hearing. By consent of the parties, the Petition is being disposed of with direction to the Vice-Chancellor of Shaheed Benazir Bhutto University, Shaheed Benazirabad that the sealed envelope containing the vote of the Petitioner shall be de-sealed in presence of both the contestants and the result of the election shall be announced as per rules/law. Pending Application (M.A. 6624/2024) also disposed of JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
